texto: Sometimes ... God answers our prayers in the way our parents do who reply to the pleas of their children with "Not just now" or "I'll have to think about that for a little while."
explicacao: Orientação direta de Roy M. Pearson sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. A afirmação “Sometimes ... God answers our prayers in the way our parents do who reply to the pleas of their c…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, prayer, sometimes, útil em momentos de reflexao.
